findings.description: Page headers and footers are incorrectly injected into the main content flow.
findings.evidence: On HTML page 2, the footer from PDF page 1 ('* Times indicated...') is rendered at the top of the table continuation. Furthermore, the page header from PDF page 2 ('Marine Fisheries Commission Business Meeting Agenda') is injected directly inside the table cell for the 10:00 a.m. activity, immediately preceding the 'Informational Materials continued:' list.
